title: melaleuca microcarpa
intro: Melaleuca microcarpa, also known as the narrow-leaved melaleuca, is a small tree native to Western Australia, belonging to the myrtle family (Myrtaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil. The health benefits of Melaleuca microcarpa include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture for various herbal applications.
